MetaCogAgent equips a multi-agent system with metacognition so each agent decides whether it should answer or delegate.

In other words, it aims for self-aware task delegation rather than fixed routing.

fullText:
面向Agent的一个代码搜索工具：Semble，用自然语言查代码库返回精准代码片段，比grep+read节省98% token消耗

方法是让Agent用自然语言直接定位到最相关的几行代码，不用瞎猜关键词，不用读整文件

速度上，索引一个普通仓库大约需要250毫秒，回答查询大约需要 1.5毫秒，NDCG@10=0.854

Semble用2k https://t.co/bzPDY6WyBi

fullText:
On-policy distillation is on track to be a lasting method in post-training. The list of areas would be:

Instruction tuning (SFT/IFT)
RLHF
Direct Preference Optimization (DPO et al)
RLVR
On-policy Distillation (OPD)

New classes of methods are rare! Excited to play.
